title: Office Cleaning Services for Camden Borough Offices
description: The Council seeks a contractor to provide daily office cleaning across three administrative buildings in Camden. Estimated value £180,000 over 3 years. Required: ISO 9001 quality management. SafeContractor or CHAS accreditation. £5m public liability insurance. No mandatory site visit. Suitable for SMEs. Annual turnover requirement: minimum £150,000.

title: Cleaning and Janitorial Services - Manchester Secondary Schools
description: Provision of janitorial services across five secondary schools in Manchester. Contractors must hold ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 environmental management. Enhanced DBS checks for all staff working on school sites. £5m public liability. Delivery location: Greater Manchester.

title: Custodial Facility Cleaning - HMP Wandsworth
description: Cleaning services for secure custodial environment. All staff must hold SC (Security Check) clearance. Prison vetting mandatory. ISO 9001 required. Estimated annual value £600,000. Minimum annual turnover £750,000.

title: Daily Office Cleaning - Surrey Business Park
description: Daily cleaning of council-leased office units at a business park in Guildford, Surrey. Contract value approx £95,000 over 2 years. SafeContractor accreditation required. £5m public liability. SME-friendly. Optional site visit available. No environmental certification mandated.

title: Grounds Maintenance and Landscaping - Essex Parks
description: Grounds maintenance, grass cutting, and landscaping across public parks in Essex. Requires arboriculture qualifications and grounds maintenance machinery. Not a cleaning contract. £10m public liability.

title: Communal Area Cleaning - Hertfordshire Housing Association
description: Cleaning of communal areas across residential blocks in Watford, Hertfordshire. £130,000 over 3 years. Contractor must hold ISO 14001 environmental accreditation in addition to ISO 9001. CHAS required. £5m public liability. Mandatory site visit on 2026-08-12.

title: Manned Guarding Services - Manchester Civic Buildings
description: Provision of manned guarding and keyholding services across civic buildings in Manchester and Salford. Contractors must hold SIA Approved Contractor Scheme (ACS) status and ISO 9001. £10m public liability insurance required. Estimated value £410,000 over 3 years. Minimum annual turnover £500,000. Delivery region: Greater Manchester / North West England only.

title: Mobile Patrol and Keyholding - Bolton Retail Park
description: Mobile patrol and keyholding services for a retail park in Bolton. SIA ACS accreditation required. NSI Gold desirable but not mandatory. £5m public liability minimum. Estimated value £150,000 over 2 years. No security clearance required.
